title: Log in and reach the lifecycle overview workspace
description: Verifies a user can log in with valid credentials and lands on the lifecycle overview page with core summary content visible.

steps.description: Verify the user lands on the lifecycle overview page
Verify Obtain and Retain summary information is displayed

title: Show an error for invalid login credentials
description: Verifies submitting incorrect credentials shows an invalid-credentials error and the user remains unauthenticated.

steps.description: Fill invalid.user@example.com into the email field
Fill wrong-password into the password field
Verify an invalid credentials error is visible
Verify the user remains on the login page

title: Filter, inspect SHAP explanation, record retention action, and export churn predictions
description: Verifies an analyst can filter to critical-risk customers, view the SHAP waterfall in the customer detail drawer, record/schedule a retention action, and export the filtered predictions to CSV.

steps.description: Click the navigation item to open Retain predictions
Select a customer row from the filtered results
Verify a customer detail drawer is displayed
Verify a SHAP waterfall explanation is displayed
Record or schedule a retention action for the customer
Export the current predictions view to CSV
Verify a retention action is shown as saved for the customer

title: Open hot lead detail, review SHAP explanation, and register a sales action
description: Verifies a user can filter to hot leads, open a lead detail drawer with SHAP waterfall and recommendations, and register a next-best-offer or sales action.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to the Obtain leads page
Select the filter for Hot leads
Open the detail drawer for the first lead in the results
Register a next-best-offer or sales action for the lead
Verify the lead detail shows a SHAP waterfall explanation
Verify the new sales action is shown in the lead activity history

title: Access Obtain details from the lifecycle overview
description: Verifies a logged-in user can review lifecycle overview insights and navigate into the Obtain dashboard for acquisition details.

steps.description: Scroll to the lifecycle ecosystem insight section
Click the navigation to acquisition details
Verify the user lands on the Obtain dashboard page
Verify acquisition KPI or summary content is displayed

title: Access Retain details from the lifecycle overview
description: Verifies a logged-in user can use the lifecycle overview to navigate into the Retain dashboard for retention details.

steps.description: Click the navigation to retention details
Verify the user lands on the Retain dashboard page
Verify retention KPI or summary content is displayed

title: Export filtered scored leads
description: Verifies a user can filter/search scored leads and export the filtered list as a CSV.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to the Obtain leads page
Fill a search term into the leads search field
Verify a CSV export is initiated for the filtered leads

title: Navigate from Retain dashboard to predictions list
description: Verifies a logged-in user can view the Retain executive dashboard and navigate to the predictions list for customer-level analysis.

steps.description: Click the navigation to the Retain dashboard
Click the navigation to the churn predictions list
Verify the user lands on the Retain predictions page
Verify a list of customer predictions is displayed

title: Search and filter predictions list and export current view
description: Verifies a user can search and apply filters on the churn predictions list, see the results ordered by churn probability, and export the current filtered view to CSV.

steps.description: Click the navigation item to open Retain predictions
Fill a valid customer search term into the search field
Export the current predictions view to CSV
Verify the customer list updates to reflect the applied search and filters

title: Review a high-risk customer with explanation and recommended action
description: Verifies a user can filter predictions by risk level, open a customer detail, and view SHAP explanation and recommended retention action.

steps.description: Click the navigation to the Retain dashboard
Click the navigation to the churn predictions list
Select a high-risk option in the risk level filter
Open a customer detail from the predictions list
Verify a SHAP waterfall explanation is displayed in the customer detail view
Verify a recommended retention action is displayed in the customer detail view

title: Upload leads CSV, map required fields, and see scored leads in table
description: Verifies a user can upload a leads CSV, map columns to Obtain dimensions including required fields, process scoring, and then see the imported leads in the scored leads table.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to the Obtain upload page
Select a CSV file of leads for upload
Map CSV columns to the required Obtain dimensions including the email field
Confirm the mapping and start processing
Verify a processing complete confirmation is visible
Click the navigation link to the Obtain leads page
Verify the leads table displays imported leads with scores

title: Upload retain CSV, map columns, process, and see predictions available
description: Verifies a retention manager can upload a customer CSV, map columns to required Retain dimensions, process successfully, and then see predictions available on the predictions page.
category: Retain Data Upload and Column Mapping

steps.description: Click the navigation item to open Retain upload
Select a valid retain CSV file
Map CSV columns to the required Retain dimensions in the mapper
Verify a processing complete confirmation is visible
Click the navigation item to open Retain predictions
Verify churn prediction rows are displayed

title: View obtain executive dashboard KPIs and navigate to leads
description: Verifies a growth manager can view CAC/LTV/funnel and CAC×LTV insights on the obtain dashboard and navigate to the scored leads page to take action.

steps.description: Click the navigation item to open Obtain dashboard
Verify CAC, LTV, and funnel metrics are displayed
Verify a CAC×LTV quadrant matrix is displayed
Click the navigation item to open Obtain leads
Verify scored lead rows are displayed

title: Default sorting shows highest-scored leads first
description: Verifies the leads table initially orders results by score descending so the best leads are prioritized.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to the Obtain leads page
Wait for the leads table to finish loading
Verify the leads are displayed ordered by score with the highest scores at the top

title: Close and reopen customer detail without losing list context
description: Verifies a user can open a customer detail drawer from the filtered predictions list, close it, and continue working with the same filtered list context.

steps.description: Click the navigation item to open Retain predictions
Select a customer row from the filtered results
Verify a customer detail drawer is displayed
Verify the predictions list remains filtered to Critico risk customers

title: Save sector configuration and see preview reflect changes
description: Verifies a tenant admin can edit sector labels, segments, and currency, save the configuration, and see the preview update accordingly.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to the Settings page
Fill a new value into the customer label field
Add or edit a segment value
Verify the settings preview reflects the updated labels, segments, and currency

title: Clear filters returns to the full scored leads list
description: Verifies a user can apply filters and then clear them to return to the unfiltered scored leads list.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to the Obtain leads page
Verify the leads list shows results without any active filters

title: Fix missing email by mapping a different column and complete processing
description: Verifies a user can resolve a missing-email validation by mapping an available CSV column to the required email dimension and complete processing successfully.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to the Obtain upload page
Select a CSV file that requires manual mapping for the email dimension
Map an available CSV column to the required email dimension
Confirm the mapping and start processing
Verify a processing complete confirmation is visible

title: Remap retain columns after validation and process successfully
description: Verifies a user can resolve mapping/required-dimension issues in the retain column mapper and complete processing successfully.
category: Retain Data Upload and Column Mapping

steps.description: Click the navigation item to open Retain upload
Select a retain CSV file that triggers missing-dimension validation
Verify a validation error indicating missing required dimensions is displayed
Update the column mapping to satisfy required Retain dimensions
Verify a processing complete confirmation is visible

title: Use obtain dashboard visual insights to inspect channels and campaigns
description: Verifies a user can view channel efficiency and campaign performance visuals on the obtain dashboard to identify campaigns to scale or pause.

steps.description: Click the navigation item to open Obtain dashboard
Verify a channel efficiency visualization is displayed
Scroll to the campaigns visualization section
Verify campaign performance points are displayed

title: Missing required email on upload shows validation and allows cancel
description: Verifies uploading a leads CSV missing the required email column shows a validation error and allows the user to cancel out of the mapping flow.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to the Obtain upload page
Select a CSV file that is missing the lead email column
Verify a validation error is visible indicating the email field is required
Cancel the upload or mapping flow
Verify the user returns to the Obtain upload start state

title: Sector labels persist across dashboards after saving settings
description: Verifies that after saving sector configuration, navigating to Lifecycle, Retain, and Obtain pages shows updated labels in the UI.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to the Settings page
Fill a new value into the customer label field
Click the navigation link to the Lifecycle overview page
Click the navigation link to the Retain dashboard page
Click the navigation link to the Obtain dashboard page
Verify the updated sector labels are reflected in the dashboards UI

title: Handle no-results state for predictions filters and allow clearing filters
description: Verifies the predictions page shows an empty state when filters yield no results and allows the user to clear filters to return to the full list.

steps.description: Click the navigation item to open Retain predictions
Select a combination of filters that results in no matching customers
Verify an empty state is displayed for the predictions list
Verify customer rows are displayed again in the predictions list

title: Show validation when retain CSV is missing required dimensions and allow cancel
description: Verifies the retain upload flow blocks processing when required dimensions are missing, shows a validation error, and allows the user to cancel out of the upload/mapping flow.
category: Retain Data Upload and Column Mapping

steps.description: Click the navigation item to open Retain upload
Select a retain CSV file that is missing required columns
Verify a validation error indicating missing required dimensions is displayed
Cancel the upload or mapping flow
Verify the user returns to the retain upload start state

title: Export includes special characters in filtered view
description: Verifies exporting a filtered leads list works when the search term includes special characters and the export is still initiated.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to the Obtain leads page
Fill a search term containing special characters into the leads search field
Verify a CSV export is initiated for the current filtered view

title: Initiate user invite from Usuarios tab
description: Verifies a tenant admin can navigate to the Usuarios tab and initiate an invite flow to add a new user.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to the Settings page
Initiate an invite for a new user
Verify an invite form is displayed for entering the new user's details
